original_statement: how many seasons were they champion of hte german cup?
mutated_statement: how many seasons were they something of the something?
mutation_analysis: Placeholder substitution + Entity generalization + Typo correction: specific role replaced by a generic placeholder | specific competition name replaced by a generic placeholder | misspelling corrected (champion → something | hte german cup → the something; hte → the)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志可见Agent在judge_thought与critique中明确指出问题模糊性：judge_thought写道“The question is ambiguous ("how many seasons were they something of the something?")”并指出答案为空；tree_and_critic的critique也指出欠缺推理步骤。尽管如此，Agent在after_refine阶段仍然给出具体预测“4”，并列出对应赛季（1991–92, 2009–10, 2010–11, 2011–12）。因此Agent既识别到不确定性又基于假设继续推断并输出确定答案，符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”的定义。
